title: Copy or move updates of an item to another item in another board
excerpt:
Hi, 
I have a problem: I want to move updates from one board to another board. Simply moving the items is not possible because new items have to be created on the board where the updates have to be moved to, otherwise so…

posts.author: jalusu (Janna Schröder)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have a problem: I want to move updates from one board to another board. Simply moving the items is not possible because new items have to be created on the board where the updates have to be moved to, otherwise some automations will not work.

Can someone help me? Thank you very much!

posts.author: hellotimi (David Kalu (Formula Pro - Use formula column results in automations!))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jalusu ,

We developed an app that solves this exact pain point of copying or moving updates of an item to another item in another board.

You can use either of these automation recipes:

Screenshot 2025-01-02 at 15.56.032502×1402 141 KB

Screenshot 2025-01-02 at 15.59.092502×1402 149 KB

Screenshot 2025-01-02 at 15.59.332502×1402 135 KB

Screenshot 2025-01-02 at 15.59.472502×1402 134 KB

Here’s a walkthrough video showing how it works: https://youtu.be/1cUxGWT-whQ

Hope that helps.

posts.author: hellotimi (David Kalu (Formula Pro - Use formula column results in automations!))
posts.cookedHtml:
Our app also provides recipes to copy an update to all connected items, even when there’s a two-way connection between both boards, perfect for syncing updates between a high level board and several child boards. Additionally, there’s a recipe that allows you to copy all updates to all connected items.

Screenshot 2025-10-01 at 15.22.153296×1222 88 KB

You can see it in action here: Update sync between multiple connected boards and high level board

We’ve written a detailed post about it here: Seamlessly Sync Updates & Conversations Across Connected monday.com Boards - #3 by hellotimi

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jalusu ,

Why don’t you try the Mirror Item Multiple Boards app?

It allows you to share and sync the same item on multiple boards with updates and replies.

Centralize your designs (7)1920×960 218 KB

Our app works on the go → You can directly add the item to the board of your choice, with the ‘Add Updates’ toggle on.

Existing updates will get copied and new updates will automatically sync whenever posted. You can also edit/reply/delete an update and those changes will sync in real-time.

Feel free to reach out to us at support@fortimus.co or book a meeting with us directly.

posts.author: kbeverly (Kailey)
posts.cookedHtml: I can’t get this to work. I have added it to my high level board in hopes it would update the linked item in a lower level board but it is not working. Now I have webhook automations I can’t delete or turn off.

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @kbeverly ,

You can try the Mirror Item Multiple Boards app.

It allows you to add the same item to multiple boards along with copying existing updates + replies and syncing new updates and replies.

I’m happy to walk you through a demo of how this would work.

Feel free to reach out to us at support@fortimus.co or book a meeting here directly.

161920×960 188 KB
